metadata.title: Infrastructure Hardening — Docker Enforcement + Pre-Push Gate

phase.name: Docker enforcement completion
phase.description:
#424 is 95% done. The remaining items: - T-08: Docker smoke test exists but skips (acceptable — needs image built) - T-13: Administrative tracking (close the issue) - T-05: CI workflow exists, manually triggered (intentional per CLAUDE.md Rule #21)
ACTION: Verify all 32 enforcement tests pass, then close #424.

task.name: Verify enforcement test suite
task.on-failure: Fix any failing tests. Do NOT skip or ignore.

phase.name: Pre-push git hook
phase.description: #469 asks for a pre-push hook that runs the full test suite before pushing. scripts/pr_readiness_check.sh already exists and runs lint + mypy + tests. We need to wire it as a git pre-push hook.

task.name: Write test for pre-push hook
task.test-first: tests/v2/unit/test_pre_push_hook.py: - test_pr_readiness_script_exists: Verify scripts/pr_readiness_check.sh exists - test_pr_readiness_script_executable: Verify it has execute permission - test_pr_readiness_script_runs_pytest: Verify it contains "pytest" command - test_pr_readiness_script_runs_ruff: Verify it contains "ruff" command - test_pr_readiness_script_runs_mypy: Verify it contains "mypy" command - test_pre_push_hook_template_exists: Verify scripts/install-hooks.sh exists

task.name: Create install-hooks.sh
task.description: Create scripts/install-hooks.sh that installs the pre-push hook. The hook should call scripts/pr_readiness_check.sh. NOT a pre-commit hook (too slow) — only runs on git push.
task.content-guidance: #!/usr/bin/env bash # Install git pre-push hook that runs PR readiness check set -euo pipefail HOOK_DIR="$(git rev-parse --git-dir)/hooks" cat > "$HOOK_DIR/pre-push" <<'HOOK' #!/usr/bin/env bash echo "Running PR readiness check before push..." bash scripts/pr_readiness_check.sh HOOK chmod +x "$HOOK_DIR/pre-push" echo "Pre-push hook installed."

phase.name: Prefect decoupling quadruple-check
phase.description: Add a comprehensive test that verifies ALL decoupling invariants. This was verified by 4 subagents — now encode it as a permanent test.

task.name: Write decoupling verification test
task.tests: - test_all_flows_have_docker_gate: Every flow file has _require_docker_context - test_no_cross_flow_imports: No flow imports from another flow module - test_all_flows_have_flow_name_constant: Every @flow uses FLOW_NAME_* constant - test_no_tmp_in_flow_files: No /tmp or tempfile usage in flow files - test_upstream_params_explicit: Flows accepting upstream data use explicit params - test_docker_compose_has_all_flow_services: docker-compose.flows.yml has entry for each flow
task.guidance: Use ast.parse() for Python analysis (CLAUDE.md Rule #16 — no regex). Use yaml.safe_load() for docker-compose parsing. Glob src/minivess/orchestration/flows/*_flow.py for flow discovery.

task.name: Commit and create PR
task.steps: 1. Run full verification: uv run pytest tests/ -x -q (expect all pass) 2. Run pre-commit: git add -A and git commit (hooks must pass) 3. git push -u origin fix/infrastructure-hardening 4. gh pr create --title "fix: infrastructure hardening — Docker enforcement + pre-push gate (#424, #469)" 5. gh issue close 424 --comment "Completed in PR #NNN. All 32 enforcement tests pass." 6. gh issue close 469 --comment "Completed in PR #NNN. install-hooks.sh wires pre-push gate."

child-plan.completion-signal: When this plan is complete, the next plan is: docs/planning/overnight-child-02.xml (MONAI ecosystem audit)
